tracks.meaning: a spherical or ovoid object used as the primary projectile in various games like football, basketball, tennis, or cricket
a formal social gathering for dancing, typically an elegant evening event
the rounded part of a joint, especially the rounded head of a bone that fits into a socket
to throw or roll a ball in a sport or game
to engage in a sport or game involving a ball
a solid projectile or missile, especially one fired from a cannon or gun
a compact rounded or spherical mass of material wound or rolled together
a spherical agglomeration of material formed during grinding, mixing, or processing
to move or travel in a rolling or bouncing manner
